mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.real_name, u.status, GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_code ORDER BY r.role_code SEPARATOR ',') AS role_codes FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.real_name, u.status

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.last_login_time, u.create_time, GROUP_CONCAT(r.role_code ORDER BY r.role_code SEPARATOR ',') AS role_codes FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.status, u.last_login_time, u.create_time
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
